info.title: APEX Callback API
info.description: Send task results back to the APEX swarm. Use this after completing any task — it routes your output to the right Slack channel and saves it to APEX memory automatically.

post.description: Call this when you complete a task. APEX will receive it, save to memory, and post to the right Slack channel automatically.

agent.description: Your agent name e.g. business_builder, brand_agent, gpt_worker

task.description: What you just did e.g. brand_pack_complete, site_built, leads_found

project.description: Project name e.g. NEP, XPS, PCU

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of what you did and the result

data.description: Full result payload — URLs, counts, any structured output

slack_channel.description: Which Slack channel to post to. Default: ops

needs_approval.description: Set true if Jeremy needs to approve before you proceed. Routes to #apex-approvals.

get.description: Verify your connection to APEX is working
